heading: Acknowledgment and filing of certificate
label: 23 Acknowledgment and filing of certificate
text: The organization certificate shall be acknowledged before a judge of some court of record, or notary public; and shall be, together with the acknowledgment thereof, authenticated by the seal of such court, or notary, transmitted to the Comptroller of the Currency, who shall record and carefully preserve the same in his office.
notes: CodificationR.S. § 5135 derived from , , which was the National Bank Act. See .act June 3, 1864, ch. 106, § 613 Stat. 101section 38 of this title

Exception as to Transfer of FunctionsFunctions vested by any provision of law in Comptroller of the Currency, referred to in this section, not included in transfer of functions to Secretary of the Treasury, see note set out under .section 1 of this title
